approval_context: Ray said: 'ok lets do nav first and then relay' and 'i approve nav.com and relay' in Funding Readiness Funnel context.

paths_approved.name: Nav.com
approved_actions: Select Nav.com as the first monetization path to review for internal preparation
Prepare internal CTA copy using placeholders
Prepare affiliate placement options for Nav.com
Update approval records and funnel docs to reflect Ray's decision
Draft safe copy using placeholders (no live links)
not_approved_actions: Insert live affiliate links for Nav.com
Publish any Nav.com CTA to any channel
Email any Nav.com affiliate content to subscribers
Post Nav.com CTAs to social media
Make any client-facing claims about Nav.com
Make funding approval or credit improvement promises related to Nav.com

paths_approved.name: Relay
approved_actions: Select Relay as the second monetization path to review for internal preparation
Prepare internal CTA copy using placeholders
Prepare affiliate placement options for Relay
Update approval records and funnel docs to reflect Ray's decision
Draft safe copy using placeholders (no live links)
not_approved_actions: Insert live affiliate links for Relay
Publish any Relay CTA to any channel
Email any Relay affiliate content to subscribers
Post Relay CTAs to social media
Make any client-facing claims about Relay

paths_not_selected_yet.name: Dun & Bradstreet
paths_not_selected_yet.reason: Higher compliance review burden; Ray chose to start with Nav.com and Relay first

paths_not_selected_yet.name: Nexus internal readiness audit
paths_not_selected_yet.reason: Long-term path; not part of current Funding Readiness Funnel monetization phase

approval_boundary: This approval authorizes INTERNAL PREPARATION ONLY. No affiliate applications, live links, publishing, emails, payments, production deployment, or client-facing use are authorized without a separate explicit Ray command.
